subcodes.first_line: This is the Day whereon the Herald hath proclaimed: "The sovereignty belongeth unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting! The mysteries have been revealed and laid bare." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم فیه نادی المناد الملک لله المهیمن القیوم قد ظهرت الاسرار و کشفت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence of; reunion with God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment
